quaia_plot_mc_shuffle.py (0V2) Visualisation & table helper for the pixel-shuffle Monte Carlo: - Reads quaia_mc_bcut_shuffle_summary.txt. - Extracts bcut, z_mid, A_obs, A_par_obs, f_par_obs, p(A), p(|A_par|). - Makes two plots: p(A) vs z_mid, p(|A_par|) vs z_mid, for each |b|-cut. - Prints a compact table suitable for notes / LaTeX. Usage (from IPython / Spyder): %run /Users/boyde/.spyder-py3/quaia_plot_mc_shuffle.py
